query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  clientId,
  CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(12,2)) as totalAmount,
  status,
  quotationId
FROM projects
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL 
  AND dataOrigin = 'manual'
  AND quotationId IS NULL
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  clientId,
  CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(12,2)) as totalAmount,
  status,
  quotationId
FROM projects
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL 
  AND dataOrigin = 'manual'
  AND quotationId IS NULL
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
